title: Provide input to production trials
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide input to production trials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for the trial

pcs.text: Clarify trial objectives, specifications, documentation and reporting requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify trial objectives, specifications, documentation and reporting requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify trial objectives, specifications, documentation and reporting requirements.

pcs.text: Identify the environmental, health, safety, and/or food safety hazards associated with the trial and the recommended control procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the environmental, health, safety, and/or food safety hazards associated with the trial and the recommended control procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the environmental, health, safety, and/or food safety hazards associated with the trial and the recommended control procedures.

pcs.text: Determine the availability of resources and the need for any clearances, special safety and storage requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the availability of resources and the need for any clearances, special safety and storage requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the availability of resources and the need for any clearances, special safety and storage requirements.

pcs.text: Review the recommended trial schedule to identify potential barriers/constraints and develop alternatives, as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review the recommended trial schedule to identify potential barriers/constraints and develop alternatives, as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review the recommended trial schedule to identify potential barriers/constraints and develop alternatives, as necessary.

pcs.text: Communicate and confirm all laboratory requirements with plant operators and personnel in related work areas and functions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Communicate and confirm all laboratory requirements with plant operators and personnel in related work areas and functions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate and confirm all laboratory requirements with plant operators and personnel in related work areas and functions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for the trial

elements.title: Participate in the trial

pcs.text: Reconfirm trial details with all relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconfirm trial details with all relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconfirm trial details with all relevant personnel.

pcs.text: Identify any last minute changes and delays and make appropriate adjustments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify any last minute changes and delays and make appropriate adjustments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify any last minute changes and delays and make appropriate adjustments.

pcs.text: Liaise closely with production personnel to conduct the trial safely and efficiently
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise closely with production personnel to conduct the trial safely and efficiently?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise closely with production personnel to conduct the trial safely and efficiently.

pcs.text: Collect required product samples for laboratory analysis and/or reference
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect required product samples for laboratory analysis and/or reference?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect required product samples for laboratory analysis and/or reference.

pcs.text: Monitor critical process parameters and record required data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor critical process parameters and record required data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor critical process parameters and record required data.

pcs.text: Monitor data to identify problems, significant process variations and/or unacceptable product
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor data to identify problems, significant process variations and/or unacceptable product?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor data to identify problems, significant process variations and/or unacceptable product.

pcs.text: Recommend changes to production processes as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommend changes to production processes as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend changes to production processes as required.

pcs.text: Leave plant in condition suitable for routine production to recommence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Leave plant in condition suitable for routine production to recommence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Leave plant in condition suitable for routine production to recommence.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Participate in the trial

elements.title: Assess and report trial outcomes

pcs.text: Arrange for, or conduct, testing of product samples to check specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange for, or conduct, testing of product samples to check specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange for, or conduct, testing of product samples to check specifications.

pcs.text: Analyse test results and relate properties of product samples to formulation details and processing methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse test results and relate properties of product samples to formulation details and processing methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse test results and relate properties of product samples to formulation details and processing methods.

pcs.text: Identify and investigate out-of-specification or unacceptable outcomes, as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and investigate out-of-specification or unacceptable outcomes, as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and investigate out-of-specification or unacceptable outcomes, as required.

pcs.text: Recommend possible modifications and/or opportunities for improvements within limits of role and responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recommend possible modifications and/or opportunities for improvements within limits of role and responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recommend possible modifications and/or opportunities for improvements within limits of role and responsibility.

pcs.text: Document and report trial outcomes in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and report trial outcomes in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and report trial outcomes in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Assess and report trial outcomes

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure the safe collection of laboratory and hazardous waste for subsequent disposal.
